name: Fort Worth Financial LLC
description_short: Fort Worth Financial LLC is a Texas-based mortgage lender offering purchase, refinance, and reverse mortgage loans with competitive rates across the Dallas-Fort Worth region.
description_long:
Fort Worth Financial LLC was founded in 2006 and operates as a full-service mortgage lender headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas. The company is licensed by the Texas Department of Savings and Mortgage Lending with NMLS IDs 359050 (company) and 343472 (principal loan officer Brett Ruddell). They serve borrowers across Fort Worth, Denton, Dallas, Weatherford, and Burleson, Texas.

The company specializes in mortgage lending across multiple loan types: conventional purchase loans, FHA loans, VA loans, jumbo home loans, cash-out refinances, reverse mortgages, and debt consolidation through home equity. Their stated approach emphasizes finding competitive rates tailored to individual borrower needs and providing comprehensive financial information to support informed decision-making. They offer online rate quotes, loan calculators, and quote requests through their website.

Fort Worth Financial distinguishes itself by focusing on local market expertise in the Dallas-Fort Worth region with a small, experienced team (2-10 employees according to LinkedIn). They highlight personalized service and acknowledge that each purchase or refinance is unique. The company provides educational resources including a blog, monthly newsletter, local resources guide, and a professional success center for real estate agents.

As a regional mortgage lender, Fort Worth Financial serves a defined geographic area rather than operating nationally. Their small size suggests potentially more personalized attention but less infrastructure than larger national lenders. Rate competitiveness depends on current market conditions and individual borrower profiles. Borrowers unhappy with service have recourse through the Texas Department of Savings and Mortgage Lending and its recovery fund for damages caused by licensed originators.
pros: Offers reverse mortgages, a specialized product many lenders don't provide
Multiple loan program options including FHA, VA, conventional, and jumbo loans
Texas-specific lending expertise covering Fort Worth, Dallas, Denton, Weatherford, and Burleson
Free online tools including rate calculator and loan program information
Direct access to principal loan officer Brett Ruddell with published phone number (817) 922-0202
Established lender with 18+ years operating history (founded 2006)
Provides educational resources including blog, newsletter, and professional success center for agents
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to five Texas cities and surrounding areas
Small team size (2-10 employees) may result in limited availability or longer processing times
No indication of 24/7 customer support or online-only application options
Specific current rates and loan terms not disclosed on website; requires direct contact
No information about automated underwriting or speedline processing capabilities
best_for: Texas homebuyers and refinancers in the Fort Worth, Dallas, and surrounding metropolitan areas
Borrowers seeking reverse mortgages or cash-out refinancing options
Buyers and refinancers who prefer working with a local, established lender with direct access to loan officers
diagnosis: Fort Worth Financial LLC is best suited for Texas borrowers in the Dallas-Fort Worth area seeking personalized mortgage service from an established local lender, particularly those interested in reverse mortgages or cash-out refinancing. The main caveat is their limited geographic footprint—they do not serve borrowers outside their defined Texas service areas—and their small team size may limit availability compared to larger national lenders.
services: Real estate search and home value tools
